headline: Everest Group Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: Everest Group (NYSE:EG) reported first-quarter 2026 results that management framed as an early confirmation of the company’s new segment structure and strategic shift toward a “more focused, more profitable, more capital-efficient” platform.
